name: Endometrial Cancer Synoptic Report
description: Synoptic pathology report template for endometrial (uterine) cancer

findings.technique: Total hysterectomy / endometrial biopsy / dilation and curettage specimen submitted for pathological examination. Specimen inked and serially sectioned.
findings.comparison: Clinical history: [abnormal uterine bleeding / postmenopausal bleeding / cervical mass]. Prior imaging: [MRI/CT/ultrasound] showing [finding]. Prior biopsy: [positive/negative].

sections.name: Specimen Type
sections.content: Specimen type: [Total abdominal hysterectomy / Laparoscopic hysterectomy / Radical hysterectomy / Endometrial biopsy / D&C]. Omentectomy: [performed/not performed].

sections.name: Histologic Type
sections.content: Histologic type: [Endometrioid adenocarcinoma / Serous carcinoma / Clear cell carcinoma / Carcinosarcoma / Mixed carcinoma / Dedifferentiated carcinoma / Other].

sections.name: Tumor Size
sections.content: Tumor size: [X]cm (greatest dimension). [Tumor location: fundus / lower uterine segment / corpus / diffuse]. [Myometrial invasion: X mm / X %].

sections.name: Grade
sections.content: FIGO Grade: [1 (well) / 2 (moderately) / 3 (poorly)]. [Endometrioid: architecture grade + nuclear grade = final grade]. [Non-endometrioid: automatically grade 3].

sections.name: Myometrial Invasion
sections.content: Myometrial invasion depth: [none (stage IA) / <50% (stage IB) / >50% (stage IC)]. [Inner myometrium / outer myometrium]. [Lymphovascular invasion: present/absent].

sections.name: Cervical Involvement
sections.content: Cervical stroma: [involved / not involved]. [Glandular / stromal] involvement. [Endocervical gland involvement only / stromal invasion].

sections.name: Lymph Nodes
sections.content: Lymph nodes: [Pelvic / Para-aortic] nodes examined: [X]. Positive: [X]. [Omental nodes: examined X, positive X]. [Extranodal extension: present/absent].

sections.name: Additional Findings
sections.content: Adnexa: [right/left] [unremarkable / involved by tumor]. Omentum: [unremarkable / involved by tumor]. [Peritoneal washings: negative/positive].

sections.name: Molecular Classification
sections.content: POLE mutation: [mutated / wild-type]. MMR deficiency: [dMMR (MLH1, PMS2, MSH2, MSH6 loss) / pMMR]. p53 mutation: [abnormal / wild-type].

impression:
1. [Histologic type], FIGO Grade [X], measuring [X]cm
2. Myometrial invasion: [depth], [stage: IA/IB/IC]
3. Cervical involvement: [present/absent]
4. Lymph nodes: [X] positive out of [X] examined
5. Lymphovascular invasion: [Present/Absent]
6. Molecular: [POLE: X, MMR: X, p53: X]
7. [FIGO 2023 stage: pT[X] pN[X] M[X]]
author: RadReport Templates
